title: Battlemages [More Magic Series]
description: Infuse your weapons and body with magic and fight!
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required
- AzureLib Armor
- Runes
- Spell Engine
- Spell Power Attributes
- Dragonsteel & Star Alloy
- Elemental Metals

### Strongly recommended
- Better Combat - for proper weapon mechanics
- The Ancient Trinkets Index - powerfull trinkets to aid you!
- The Cursed Trinkets Index - more trinkets more fun!
- The Great Alchemical Compendium - potions that grants powerfull bonus but only for a limited time!
# ✨ Features
This mod add 3 new playable classes to the game, to compliment the role play experience.

### Fire Battlemage, Frost Battlemage and Arcane Battlemage Spell Books
Craft a Spell Binding Table (just don't forget bookshelves around the Spell Binding Table).

To unlock Fire Battlemage spells, create the Fire Battlemage Spell Book on the Spell Binding Table!

To unlock Frost Battlemage spells, create the Frost Battlemage Spell Book on the Spell Binding Table!

To unlock Arcane Battlemage spells, create the Arcane Battlemage Spell Book on the Spell Binding Table!

### Explore the armory
Explore new, craftable, Battlemage equipment, with bonuses to boost spell damage.

![Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70cfdea3a491b427d32fb86b255360a4b7a5bf8d.png)

Fire Battlemage: new 2 armor sets, Fire Weapons.

Frost Battlemage: new 2 armor sets, Frost Weapons.

Arcane Battlemage: new 2 armor sets, Arcane Weapons.

# 🔧 Configuration
### Item bonuses:
- config/battlemages/item_v3

### Effect bonuses:
- config/battlemages/effects
